Caption: A green-wrapped Nestlé KitKat bar with matcha flavor rests on a light wooden surface, displaying visible branding and nutritional details.  

Visual details: The image shows a sealed Nestlé KitKat chocolate bar with a glossy green wrapper. Prominent elements include the red oval "KitKat" logo with "Nestlé" branding, Japanese text reading "こだわりの宇治抹茶" (carefully selected Uji matcha), "63 kcal", "3%", and "1枚あたり" (per piece). Additional visible text includes "甘" (sweet) and "抹茶" (matcha), while the wrapper’s serrated edges and the light brown wooden table surface with visible grain patterns provide context for the composition.  

Context cues: Taken in September 2014, suggesting an autumn season. The photo captures a personal snack on a home wooden table.  

Search keywords: KitKat matcha chocolate bar, Nestlé, Japanese matcha snack, green wrapper, Uji matcha, 63 kcal candy, chocolate packaging, autumn snack, wooden table, close-up food photo

Caption: A close-up of a vibrant sashimi platter features neatly arranged slices of salmon, tuna, and other fresh fish, accompanied by thin radish strips and shredded vegetable toppings.  

Visual details: Bright orange salmon slices, dark red tuna slices, and white fish with red edges (likely yellowtail or sea bass) are layered atop thin pale radish strips and shredded white vegetables (such as cabbage or radish). The composition focuses on the raw fish and toppings, with no background elements visible. Mood is fresh and appetizing, emphasizing the platter’s visual appeal. No readable text or OCR is present.  

Context cues: Captured in November 2014 during early morning hours (5:33 AM Japan time zone), suggesting an autumn meal in a Japanese dining setting.  

Search keywords: sashimi, salmon, tuna, radish strips, shredded vegetables, fresh fish, Japanese seafood, raw fish platter, seafood arrangement, raw fish dishes

Caption: A steaming hot pot with a rich, reddish broth features thick slices of pork, bean sprouts, and green vegetable pieces, all bubbling vigorously in a metal pan.  

Visual details: A round metal skillet holds a thick, bubbling broth with visible steam. Floating ingredients include circular pork slices, clusters of white bean sprouts, and green leafy vegetable segments. No text or other objects are visible; the focus is solely on the hot pot’s ingredients and bubbling surface.  

Context cues: Captured in winter (January 2015), suggesting a warm meal prepared in a home kitchen.  

Search keywords: hot pot, steaming broth, pork slices, bean sprouts, green vegetables, bubbling soup, spicy broth, meat and vegetable stew, winter food

Caption: A stainless steel bowl holds thick brown noodles, a halved hard-boiled egg with a bright yellow yolk, and fresh cucumber slices in a dark, steaming broth. The meal is presented on a wooden surface with the noodles centered in the bowl.  

Visual details: Stainless steel bowl containing thick brown noodles (visible strands), halved hard-boiled egg (yellow yolk), and fresh cucumber slices in a dark glossy broth with visible bubbles. The bowl rests on a wooden table, with the composition focused on the food, highlighting textures of the noodles and vegetables. No readable text appears in the image.  

Context cues: Spring daytime meal (April 11, 2017), captured with an Apple iPhone SE.  

Search keywords: noodles, hard-boiled egg, cucumber slices, dark broth, stainless steel bowl, wooden table, spring, warm dish, fresh vegetables, thick noodles

Caption: A stainless steel bowl contains dark glass noodles, cucumber slices, white radish strips, and golden-brown fried pieces, all topped with sesame seeds and a light sauce.  

Visual details: A metal bowl holds dark, translucent glass noodles, green cucumber slices, pale white radish strips, golden-brown fried pieces (likely tofu or egg), and scattered sesame seeds. A light yellow sauce pools near the top, with hints of dark green herbs. The top-down view focuses on mixed ingredients within the bowl, resting on a wooden surface with no visible text.  

Context cues: Spring 2017 meal photographed with an iPhone SE in a casual dining setting.  

Search keywords: glass noodles, cucumber, radish, sesame seeds, fried tofu, egg, sauce, bowl, food closeup, spring meal

Caption: A metal bowl filled with dark broth, brown rice noodles, a halved boiled egg, and sliced cucumber strips sits on a wooden table.  

Visual details: A silver-rimmed metal bowl contains glossy dark broth with visible bubbles. In the center, a mound of brown rice noodles sits beside a halved hard-boiled egg (yellow yolk intact), thin cucumber strips, and perilla leaves. The bowl rests on a wooden surface, photographed from above with natural lighting.  

Context cues: Spring daytime meal photographed in South Korea on April 11, 2017, using an iPhone SE.  

Search keywords: brown rice noodles, boiled egg, cucumber strips, perilla leaves, dark broth, metal bowl, wooden table, Korean meal, noodle soup

Caption: An infographic from 2019 highlights Pyongyang cold noodles (평양냉면) with a detailed bowl illustration showing a soft-boiled egg, green cucumber strips, and crispy golden strips, alongside a color-coded map of South Korea listing regional noodle variations.  

Visual details: A golden bowl at the top holds Pyongyang noodles with visible ingredients: a halved soft-boiled egg, thin green cucumber strips, and golden crispy strips (likely corn or chive). Below, a map of South Korea uses color blocks to denote regions (Seoul, Gangwon, Jeju, etc.), with Korean text boxes listing local noodle variants—Seoul’s “Noryangmyeon” and “Sarangmyeon,” Gangwon’s “Pyongyangmyeon,” Jeju’s “Daejangmyeon,” and Busan’s “Budamyeon.” The background includes a traditional Korean building sketch. Text on the left notes “2019” and “서울 (Seoul)” with regional noodle names.  

Context cues: Captured in June 2019, this cultural food guide focuses on South Korea’s regional noodle traditions for travel or food exploration.  

Search keywords: Pyongyang noodles, Korean regional noodle map, soft-boiled egg topping, cucumber strips, fried strips (corn/chive), Seoul noodles, Gangwon noodles, Jeju noodles, Busan noodles, Korean food guide, 2019 food infographic, rice noodles, noryangmyeon, sarangmyeon
